Query.SQL: SELECT CO.CO_NUMBER AS "CO.CO_NUMBER", CO.OLD_NUMBER AS "CO.OLD_NUMBER", CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE AS "CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE", CT.NAME AS "CT.NAME", CO.CO_TYPE AS "CO.CO_TYPE", CO.AO_N60_DATE AS "CO.AO_N60_DATE", CO.ATTACHMENT_ARREARS_DATE AS "CO.ATTACHMENT_ARREARS_DATE", CO.ATTACHMENT_LAPSED_DATE AS "CO.ATTACHMENT_LAPSED_DATE", CO.REVOKED_DISCHARGED_DATE AS "CO.REVOKED_DISCHARGED_DATE", CO.ORDER_DATE AS "CO.ORDER_DATE", CO.CO_STATUS AS "CO.CO_STATUS", CO.DEBTOR_NAME AS "CO.DEBTOR_NAME", GA.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE1", (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'N','Y') FROM HEARINGS H WHERE H.CO_NUMBER = CO.CO_NUMBER) AS "H.HEARINGS_EXIST", (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM PAYMENTS PY WHERE PY.SUBJECT_NO = CO.CO_NUMBER AND PY.PAYMENT_FOR = 'CO') AS "PY.PAYMENTS_EXIST", (SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') FROM DIVIDENDS DV WHERE DV.DIV_CO_NUMBER = CO.CO_NUMBER) AS "DV.DIVIDENDS_EXIST", CO.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CO_ORA_ROWSCN", GA.ORA_ROWSCN AS "GA_ORA_ROWSCN", CT.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CT_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM CONSOLIDATED_ORDERS CO, GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA, COURTS CT WHERE CO.CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND CT.CODE = CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE AND GA.CO_NUMBER = CO.CO_NUMBER AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CO DEBTOR' AND GA.VALID_TO IS NULL

LinkedSQL.SQL: SELECT COE_AGE_CATEGORY AS "COE.AGE_CATEGORY" , COE_ALD_DEBT_SEQ AS "COE.ALD_DEBT_SEQ" , COE_BAILIFF_IDENTIFIER AS "COE.BAILIFF_IDENTIFIER" , COE_BMS_TASK_NUMBER AS "COE.BMS_TASK_NUMBER" , COE_CO_EVENT_SEQ AS "COE.CO_EVENT_SEQ" , COE_CREATING_COURT AS "COE.CREATING_COURT" , COE_CREATING_SECTION AS "COE.CREATING_SECTION" , COE_DETAILS AS "COE.DETAILS" , COE_ERROR_INDICATOR AS "COE.ERROR_INDICATOR" , COE_EVENT_DATE AS "COE.EVENT_DATE" , COE_ISSUE_STAGE AS "COE.ISSUE_STAGE" , COE_PROCESS_DATE AS "COE.PROCESS_DATE" , COE_RECEIPT_DATE AS "COE.RECEIPT_DATE" , COE_SERVICE_DATE AS "COE.SERVICE_DATE" , COE_SERVICE_STATUS AS "COE.SERVICE_STATUS" , COE_STATS_MODULE AS "COE.STATS_MODULE" , COE_STD_EVENT_ID AS "COE.STD_EVENT_ID" , COE_USERNAME AS "COE.USERNAME" , COE_USERALIAS AS "COE.USERALIAS" , COE_WARRANT_ID AS "COE.WARRANT_ID" , SE_CATEGORY AS "SE.CATEGORY" , SE_DESCRIPTION AS "SE.DESCRIPTION" , SE_EDIT_DETAILS AS "SE.EDIT_DETAILS" , SE_STATUS AS "STATUS" , REF2_OBSOLETE AS "REF2.OBSOLETE" , COE_ORA_ROWSCN AS "COE_ORA_ROWSCN" , SE_ORA_ROWSCN AS "SE_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM (SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY COE.ERROR_INDICATOR , COE.CO_EVENT_SEQ DESC) AS R , COE.AGE_CATEGORY AS "COE_AGE_CATEGORY" , COE.ALD_DEBT_SEQ AS "COE_ALD_DEBT_SEQ" , COE.BAILIFF_IDENTIFIER AS "COE_BAILIFF_IDENTIFIER" , COE.BMS_TASK_NUMBER AS "COE_BMS_TASK_NUMBER" , COE.CO_EVENT_SEQ AS "COE_CO_EVENT_SEQ" , COE.CREATING_COURT AS "COE_CREATING_COURT" , COE.CREATING_SECTION AS "COE_CREATING_SECTION" , COE.DETAILS AS "COE_DETAILS" , COE.ERROR_INDICATOR AS "COE_ERROR_INDICATOR" , COE.EVENT_DATE AS "COE_EVENT_DATE" , COE.ISSUE_STAGE AS "COE_ISSUE_STAGE" , COE.PROCESS_DATE AS "COE_PROCESS_DATE" , COE.RECEIPT_DATE AS "COE_RECEIPT_DATE" , COE.SERVICE_DATE AS "COE_SERVICE_DATE" , COE.SERVICE_STATUS AS "COE_SERVICE_STATUS" , COE.STATS_MODULE AS "COE_STATS_MODULE" , COE.STD_EVENT_ID AS "COE_STD_EVENT_ID" , COE.USERNAME AS "COE_USERNAME" , ( SELECT NVL(DU.USER_SHORT_NAME, '') FROM DCA_USER DU WHERE DU.USER_ID = COE.USERNAME ) AS "COE_USERALIAS" , COE.WARRANT_ID AS "COE_WARRANT_ID" , SE.CATEGORY AS "SE_CATEGORY" , SE.DESCRIPTION AS "SE_DESCRIPTION" , SE.EDIT_DETAILS AS "SE_EDIT_DETAILS" , '0' AS "SE_STATUS" , (CASE WHEN SE.CATEGORY IN (SELECT REF.RV_LOW_VALUE FROM CCBC_REF_CODES REF WHERE REF.RV_DOMAIN = 'CO_EVENT_CATEGORY') THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END) AS "REF2_OBSOLETE" , COE.ORA_ROWSCN AS "COE_ORA_ROWSCN" , SE.ORA_ROWSCN AS "SE_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM CO_EVENTS COE , STANDARD_EVENTS SE WHERE COE.CO_NUMBER = ${CO.CO_NUMBER} AND SE.EVENT_ID = COE.STD_EVENT_ID ORDER BY COE.ERROR_INDICATOR , COE.CO_EVENT_SEQ DESC) WHERE R < ((${param.pageNumber}*${param.pageSize})+1) AND R > ((${param.pageNumber}*${param.pageSize})-${param.pageSize})

( SELECT COE.CO_EVENT_SEQ AS "COE.CO_EVENT_SEQ" , 'WP' AS "OUTPUT.TYPE" , WO.FINAL_IND AS "OUTPUT.FINAL_IND" , TO_CHAR(WO.OUTPUT_ID) AS "OUTPUT.OUTPUT_ID" , 'Word Processing Output' AS "OUTPUT.DESCRIPTION" , TO_CHAR(WO.XMLSOURCE) AS "OUTPUT.DOCUMENT_ID" , '' AS "OUTPUT.REPORT_ID" FROM WP_OUTPUT WO, CO_EVENTS COE WHERE COE.CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND WO.CO_EVENT_SEQ = COE.CO_EVENT_SEQ AND WO.OUTPUT_ID = (SELECT MAX(WO2.OUTPUT_ID) FROM WP_OUTPUT WO2 WHERE WO2.CO_EVENT_SEQ = COE.CO_EVENT_SEQ) ) UNION ( SELECT COE.CO_EVENT_SEQ AS "COE.CO_EVENT_SEQ" , 'OR' AS "OUTPUT.TYPE" , 'Y' AS "OUTPUT.FINAL_IND" , RO.ORDER_ID AS "OUTPUT.OUTPUT_ID" , OT.ORDER_DESCRIPTION AS "OUTPUT.DESCRIPTION" , TO_CHAR(RQ.DOCUMENT_ID) AS "OUTPUT.DOCUMENT_ID" , TO_CHAR(RO.REPORT_ID) AS "OUTPUT.REPORT_ID" FROM REPORT_OUTPUT RO , REPORT_QUEUE RQ , CO_EVENTS COE , ORDER_TYPES OT WHERE COE.CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND RO.CO_EVENT_SEQ = COE.CO_EVENT_SEQ AND RQ.ID = RO.REPORT_ID AND OT.ORDER_ID = RO.ORDER_ID )

( SELECT COE.CO_EVENT_SEQ AS "COE.CO_EVENT_SEQ", P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME", P.PARTY_ID AS "P.PARTY_ID" FROM ALLOWED_DEBTS AD , GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA2 , PARTIES P , CO_EVENTS COE WHERE AD.DEBT_CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND AD.DEBT_SEQ = COE.ALD_DEBT_SEQ AND GA2.ALD_SEQ = AD.DEBT_SEQ AND GA2.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CO CRED' AND GA2.VALID_TO IS NULL AND P.PARTY_ID = GA2.PARTY_ID ) UNION ( SELECT COE.CO_EVENT_SEQ AS "COE.CO_EVENT_SEQ", P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME", P.PARTY_ID AS "P.PARTY_ID" FROM ALLOWED_DEBTS AD , PARTIES P , CO_EVENTS COE WHERE AD.DEBT_CO_NUMBER = ${param.coNumber} AND AD.DEBT_SEQ = COE.ALD_DEBT_SEQ AND P.PARTY_ID = AD.CP_CREDITOR_ID )
